module.name: definition
module.description: Renders a dictionary/glossary entry: an accent-colored term heading above its definition, with a vertical accent rule beside the definition body.
module.aiSpec:
Use to present a term and its definition in a dictionary/glossary style — an accent-colored heading with a vertical rule beside the body. Block module: the body has exactly two sections split by `<!-- @ -->` — the first is the term, the second is its definition (ordinary Markdown). For a comparison of two options use @compare; for a plain callout use @callout.
Parameters: • color (color, default var(--accent-color)) — accent for the term heading and rule. • size (select: sm | md | lg, default md) — overall text scale of the entry. • align (select: left | center | right, default left) — text alignment. • boxed (boolean, default false) — wrap the entry in a subtle tinted card with padding.
Example: <!-- @definition color: var(--accent-color), boxed: true --> Markdown <!-- @ --> A lightweight markup language for creating formatted text using a plain-text editor. <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Accent Color
param.desc: Accent color for the term heading and the vertical rule

param.name: size
param.label: Size
param.desc: Overall text scale of the entry

param.name: align
param.label: Alignment
param.desc: Text alignment of the term and definition

param.name: boxed
param.label: Boxed
param.desc: Wrap the entry in a subtle tinted card with padding

snippet.label: Definition
snippet.text: <!-- @definition color: var(--accent-color) --> Markdown <!-- @ --> A lightweight markup language for creating formatted text using a plain-text editor. <!-- @end -->
